themes.reasoning_notes: Repeatable team trample helps aggressive boards convert attacks into damage; low-cost body fits beatdown curves.
Its activated ability grants trample, a damage-pushing form of combat evasion for creature-heavy decks.
Repeatable team trample mainly helps creature-heavy aggressive decks push damage, but it is mana-hungry and not a dedicated aggro payoff.
Granting all your creatures trample is a real combat-evasion enabler, though it is narrower than core evasive-theme cards.
